scenarios.name: a child sees only their own permission and decision rows; another child sees neither, while an adult sees all

INSERT INTO app_parental_agreement__decisions (id, permission_id, child_id, decision, decided_by, decided_at) VALUES ('d1', 'p1', ?, 'approved', ?, '2026-01-02T00:00:00Z')

scenarios.name: the decisions ledger is endpoint-only: even an adult cannot write it directly via app SQL
